title: Meitou "Isekai no Yu" Kaitakuki: Around 40 Onsen Mania no Tensei Saki wa, Nonbiri Onsen Tengoku deshita

synonyms: Meitou "Isekai no Yu" Kaitakuki: Arafoo 40 Onsen Mania no Tensei Saki wa, Nonbiri Onsen Tengoku deshita
alternative_titles.ja: 名湯『異世界の湯』開拓記 ～アラフォー温泉マニアの転生先は、のんびり温泉天国でした～

synopsis:
During an expedition to discover a new hot spring, middle-aged Kouzou Yukawa finds himself falling from a great height. Luckily, that is not the end of him, as a goddess transports him into another world and assigns her assistant Mayudama to guide him! Wasting no time, Kouzou immediately begins to bathe in a hot spring and convinces Mayudama to join him. As more people begin to show up at the place, Kouzou hopes to share its greatness with everyone.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
